rdf:Description.dc:description: Hyperbolic backbone fits for p-y (H-mode, horizontal) and t-z (V-mode, vertical) per 0.5 m depth slice. Panels (a) and (b) overlay OptumGX integrated 3D-FE soil reactions (markers) on calibrated hyperbolic fits (lines) at four representative depths in the intact case. Panel (c) summarises fit quality (R^2) across the full 290-slice ensemble.
